packageRules.description: Never digest-pin the self-referential reusable workflow in renovate-changeset.yml. It is invoked `@main` on purpose: the reusable job's OIDC `job_workflow_ref` claim must equal the AWS minter role's StringEquals-pinned `ŌĆ”@refs/heads/main` (docs/cicd/renovate-integration.md ┬¦7). `helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests` would rewrite it to a commit SHA, breaking `sts:AssumeRoleWithWebIdentity` so minting fails on every Renovate PR (this happened in #152). This is an in-repo self-reference on a protected branch, so SHA immutability buys nothing here.

Auto-merge non-major updates once all required checks pass (CI build/lint/test, merge-checks, the Socket supply-chain scanner, changeset-present). Majors are deliberately absent from `matchUpdateTypes`, so they never auto-merge and always get a human. The build-scripts rule below overrides this back to manual; patched-deps inherit it (they self-gate ŌĆö a broken patch fails CI). Security updates auto-merge regardless via `vulnerabilityAlerts`.

Packages with install/build scripts (pnpm `onlyBuiltDependencies` in pnpm-workspace.yaml) run arbitrary code on install. Pull each out of the `group:allNonMajor` batch into its own PR with a distinct title/label, and never auto-merge ŌĆö so the script-running bump is reviewed in isolation. Keep this list in sync with `onlyBuiltDependencies`.

Packages with a pnpm patch (`patchedDependencies` in pnpm-workspace.yaml) carry a version-pinned patch; a bump usually leaves the patch unapplied and breaks the lockfile relock (`pnpm install` fails). Pull each out of the `group:allNonMajor` batch into its own PR with a distinct title/label so a broken patch doesn't sink the batch ŌĆö but don't force manual merge: a broken patch fails CI and waits for a human to re-roll or drop it, while a bump that still applies cleanly (e.g. an unversioned patch) rides the non-major auto-merge rule above. `matchPackageNames` is kept in sync with `patchedDependencies` by repo-kit; do not edit it by hand.
repo-kit templates all .nvmrc files; a Renovate bump is reverted by `pnpm sync` and fails the merge-checks gate
engines.node / engines.pnpm are written by repo-kit (.repo-kit.yml); updating them fails the sync gate
tsdown's version is owned by repo-kit (.repo-kit.yml), not Renovate
